RE-ADJUDICATION REQUEST
Batch: BAT-2026-NB-00004295-OT  |  Period: 01-02-2026 - 28-02-2026

CLAIM DETAILS:
  Bundle ID:          9dd94049-87d8-4bc7-b05e-2d3cabb695c5
  Transaction ID:     6630039
  Patient NID:        2541881922
  Claim Type:         professional / emr
  Encounter Class:    EMER
  Policy Number:      1060000032
  Policy Holder:      Al Bawani Co Ltd.
  Net Amount:         SAR 733.04

REJECTION DETAILS:
  [BE-1-4] – 1 service(s) rejected:
    • 03/02/2026 | B00403 – CBC WITHOUT DIFFERENTIAL COUNT

  APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (BE-1-4):
  PREAUTHORIZATION APPEAL: The service was provided without prior authorization due to clinical urgency / administrative oversight. We hereby submit a retroactive preauthorization request with full clinical justification as required under ART PreAuth Protocol – General Requirements. All supporting clinical documentation is attached.
  Supporting Documents: Medical report, clinical notes, diagnosis confirmation, treatment plan

  [CV-1-3] – 1 service(s) rejected:
    • 03/02/2026 | D00076 – C.T-BRAIN

  APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (CV-1-3):
  COVERAGE VERIFICATION APPEAL: We are appealing the coverage determination and requesting re-adjudication based on the attached policy benefit schedule. If the primary diagnosis is excluded, we request consideration of the secondary covered diagnosis as documented in the clinical notes.
  Supporting Documents: Policy benefit schedule, clinical documentation for alternate diagnosis

  [CV-1-9] – 1 service(s) rejected:
    • 03/02/2026 | N00004 – CONSULTATION FEE (RESIDENT DR)

  APPEAL JUSTIFICATION (CV-1-9):
  COVERAGE APPEAL: Member eligibility and benefit coverage have been verified. We request re-adjudication under the verified coverage confirmation attached.
  Supporting Documents: Eligibility verification, benefit schedule confirmation

---
